missingRequiredOption.title: Missing required option
missingRequiredOption.detail: Required option '{{optionName}}' is missing for product '{{productId}}'

rateLimitExceeded.title: Too many requests
rateLimitExceeded.detail: Rate limit exceeded. Try again later.

forbidden.title: Forbidden
forbidden.detail: You do not have permission to perform this action

productHasOrderReferences.title: Conflict
productHasOrderReferences.detail: Product '{{productId}}' has orders; set status to discontinued instead

badRequest.title: Bad request
badRequest.detail: The request could not be processed

uploadMimeNotAllowed.title: Unsupported file type
uploadMimeNotAllowed.detail: Allowed image types are WebP, JPEG, and PNG. Received: {{mimeType}}

uploadTooLarge.title: File too large
uploadTooLarge.detail: The file exceeds the maximum size for {{kind}} uploads

uploadInvalidImage.title: Invalid image file
uploadInvalidImage.detail: The uploaded file could not be read as an image

uploadStorageFailed.title: Upload storage error
uploadStorageFailed.detail: Could not save the uploaded file. Check MODEL_FILES_BASE_PATH permissions.

registrationLimit.title: Registration not allowed
registrationLimit.detail: The maximum of 2 accounts per IP address and per device has been reached
